# mktsum

> AI-powered market briefings, delivered daily to your watchlist.

mktsum is a personal finance tool that lets users maintain a watchlist of stock tickers and receive AI-generated market briefings each morning via push notifications (ntfy). Briefings include a full markdown newsletter and a short TL;DR summary, generated by an LLM from live RSS feeds and Yahoo Finance data.

## Public pages

- `/` — landing page
- `/login` — user login
- `/signup` — user registration
- `/share/{id}` — publicly shared briefing (OG-friendly preview page, redirects to the SPA)
- `/legal` — legal index (terms, privacy policy, financial disclaimer)

## Auth-required pages

All of the following require a valid session:

- `/dashboard` — latest briefing + watchlist overview
- `/watchlist` — manage ticker watchlist (max 15 tickers)
- `/briefings/all` — full briefing history
- `/briefings/{id}` — single briefing (full markdown + sources)
- `/profile` — user settings and ntfy topic configuration

## API

The public REST API is available at `https://mktsum.yxnliu.net/v1/`. Authentication uses opaque bearer tokens (30-day TTL) obtained via `POST /v1/auth/login`.

Key endpoints:
- `POST /v1/users` — register (no auth required)
- `POST /v1/auth/login` — login
- `GET /v1/briefings/{id}` — fetch a briefing (public if `is_public` is true)
- `GET /v1/watchlist/user/{userId}` — fetch a user's watchlist

## Notifications

mktsum uses [ntfy](https://ntfy.sh) for push notifications. Users subscribe to a self-chosen topic name in the ntfy app and configure it in their profile. Briefings are pushed to that topic each morning.

## Not intended for scraping

Briefings are personal and user-generated. Only briefings explicitly marked as public by the user are accessible without auth.
